query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS house_service_licenses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  department_id INT NOT NULL,
  license_status ENUM('pending', 'active', 'suspended', 'terminated') DEFAULT 'pending',
  license_start_date BIGINT,
  license_end_date BIGINT,
  billing_cycle ENUM('monthly', 'annual') DEFAULT 'monthly',
  last_payment_date BIGINT,
  next_payment_date BIGINT,
  total_revenue_earned DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_fees_paid DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  approved_by INT,
  approved_at BIGINT,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_house_dept (house_id, department_id)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  department_id INT NOT NULL,
  license_status ENUM('pending', 'active', 'suspended', 'terminated') DEFAULT 'pending',
  license_start_date BIGINT,
  license_end_date BIGINT,
  billing_cycle ENUM('monthly', 'annual') DEFAULT 'monthly',
  last_payment_date BIGINT,
  next_payment_date BIGINT,
  total_revenue_earned DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_fees_paid DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  approved_by INT,
  approved_at BIGINT,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_house_dept (house_id, department_id)
);
